text: Supreme Court allows Texas to require age verification for mobile apps - CNN
fullText: The Supreme Court on Monday allowed Texas to enforce a law that requires mobile app stores to verify the age of users and obtain parental consent for minors attempting to install programs on their phones.

text: Deadly Russian strikes hit Ukraine’s capital ahead of key NATO meeting - The Washington Post

text: Explosive diarrhea? Here's what to know about Cyclospora - WRAL
